name: Star Wars
description: A galaxy far, far away: characters, planets, and lightsabers

questions.q: According to his own boast, how many forms of communication is C-3PO fluent in?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: prefixed choices with 'Over' to match canonical line 'over six million forms of communication'. Built by a young Anakin Skywalker on Tatooine.

questions.q: What color is Mace Windu's lightsaber, famously requested by actor Samuel L. Jackson?

source.notes: Jackson wanted to find himself in the crowded battle scenes.

questions.q: What is the name of the snow creature that attacks Luke on the ice planet Hoth in 'The Empire Strikes Back'?

source.notes: Native to Hoth. Luke escapes by using the Force to retrieve his lightsaber.

questions.q: What creature does Han Solo cut open to keep Luke warm in freezing temperatures on Hoth?

source.notes: Famous line: 'And I thought they smelled bad on the outside.'

questions.q: What is Count Dooku's secret Sith alias?

source.notes: Apprentice to Darth Sidious (Palpatine). Played by Christopher Lee.

questions.q: What is Emperor Palpatine's Sith name?

source.notes: Was Chancellor of the Galactic Republic, then Emperor of the Galactic Empire.

questions.q: In 'Attack of the Clones,' who severs Anakin Skywalker's right arm?

source.notes: During the duel on Geonosis. Dooku later has his head cut off by Anakin in Revenge of the Sith.

questions.q: Who fires the torpedo that destroys the Death Star in 'A New Hope'?

source.notes: Famous 'Use the Force, Luke' moment from Obi-Wan's spirit.

questions.q: Which bounty hunter confronts Han Solo in the Mos Eisley Cantina?

source.notes: Rodian bounty hunter working for Jabba. The 'Han shot first' debate lives here.

questions.q: Who adopts baby Leia at the end of 'Revenge of the Sith'?

source.notes: Senator of Alderaan. Leia becomes Princess Leia Organa.

questions.q: What creatures kidnap R2-D2 on Tatooine in 'A New Hope'?

source.notes: They then sell R2 and C-3PO to Owen Lars. Speak Jawaese, famously saying 'Utinni!'

questions.q: As a slave child on Tatooine, who built C-3PO from scrap parts?

source.notes: Shown in 'The Phantom Menace.' Built to help his mother Shmi.

questions.q: Which cyborg general commands the Separatist droid army in 'Revenge of the Sith'?

source.notes: Kaleesh origin. Voiced by Matthew Wood. Wields 4 lightsabers at once.

questions.q: What is the name of Han Solo's ship, the 'fastest hunk of junk in the galaxy'?

source.notes: Won from Lando Calrissian in a sabacc game. Made the Kessel Run in '12 parsecs.'

questions.q: What is the home planet of Luke Skywalker?

source.notes: Desert planet with two suns. Also Anakin's home.

questions.q: On which swamp planet does Yoda live in exile, training Luke?

source.notes: Where Luke sees the vision in the cave in 'Empire Strikes Back.'

questions.q: In 'A New Hope,' which stormtrooper's armor does Luke wear while infiltrating the Death Star?

source.notes: FN-2187 became Finn in the sequel trilogy.

questions.q: Which actor physically portrayed Darth Vader in the original trilogy (the voice being James Earl Jones's)?

source.notes: Prowse was a British bodybuilder. Never knew his voice would be dubbed.

questions.q: Which furry species of forest-dwellers help the Rebels defeat the Empire on Endor?

source.notes: 'Return of the Jedi' (1983). They worship C-3PO as a god.

questions.q: Who played Chancellor Palpatine (and Emperor Palpatine) throughout the Star Wars film saga?

source.notes: Played Palpatine from 'Return of the Jedi' (1983) through 'The Rise of Skywalker' (2019).

questions.q: What is the name of Luke Skywalker's uncle, who raises him on Tatooine?

source.notes: Married to Aunt Beru. Step-brother to Anakin via marriage. Killed by stormtroopers.

questions.q: Who was originally meant to be a human character before being reimagined as a giant slug-like alien?

source.notes: Originally filmed with actor Declan Mulholland in a vest, but the scene was cut from 'A New Hope.'
